next_steps: Formal echocardiogram to screen for infiltrative cardiomyopathy and wall motion abnormalities
Cardiac MRI with gadolinium enhancement to assess for myocardial inflammation and fibrosis
Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) of mediastinal lymph nodes for histopathology and cultures
Serum ACE level, calcium, 1,25-dihydroxyvitamin D, and urinalysis for hypercalciuria
Comprehensive autoimmune panel including ANA, anti-dsDNA, and ENA
18F-FDG PET/CT to evaluate for systemic distribution of granulomatous disease and to guide biopsy site selection
